author: lOrm
content: BlastRadiusGuard::record_access now distinguishes 'representable breach' (count fits in u32 but exceeds the cap) from 'u32 overflow' (count cannot even be represented — likely a bug or attack signal). Two distinct warn! messages; the overflow form names the overflow explicitly. Pre-existing test_blast_radius_max_files still passes; added blast_radius_breach_reports_distinct_message_for_representable_count to lock in the message-distinguishability contract.
